component.name: Yandex Disk
component.summary: Native GNOME client for Yandex Disk

description.p: Yandex Disk is a native GNOME client for browsing and synchronizing files with Yandex Disk. It includes a GTK/libadwaita control application, a background sync daemon, and optional host integration components such as a Nautilus extension and a FUSE helper.
The GTK application handles account setup, daemon control, diagnostics, and integration status. Full desktop integration may require companion host packages outside sandboxed distributions.
